name: goal-plan
description: Prepare reviewed long-horizon goal plans with adversarial acceptance gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and gate long-running Codex goals.
interface.longDescription: Goal Plan prepares verifiable long-horizon implementation plans, separates generation from verification, creates launch prompts for Codex Go or CLI work, and requires independent acceptance evidence before a goal is considered complete.
defaultPrompt: Use /goal-plan to prepare a reviewed long-running implementation plan.
